fields.description: Master switch. When off, the floating Triton assistant is hidden for everyone.
fields.label: Enable Triton Assistant

fields.description: Base URL of the Triton API (no trailing slash).
fields.label: Triton Base URL

fields.description: Shared secret matching ERPNEXT_GATEWAY_SECRET on the Triton server. Used server-side to mint per-user tokens; never exposed to the browser.
fields.label: Gateway Secret

fields.description: Default model new chats open with. Triton may auto-route to a stronger model per request.
fields.label: Default Model

fields.description: Per-request timeout in seconds for calls to Triton.
fields.label: Request Timeout (s)

fields.description: Allow users to attach the page they are on (document, list, or report) to the chat as context.
fields.label: Enable "Add page to context"

fields.description: Allow Triton to propose changes in ERPNext (create/update records, tasks, emails). Each change is shown as a confirmation card the user must approve.
fields.label: Enable write actions (with confirmation)

fields.description: Log proxy requests/responses to the Error Log for troubleshooting.
fields.label: Debug Logging
Connection Help
fields.options: Use Test Connection (menu) to verify the Base URL and Gateway Secret can mint a token for your account.
